calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Placement And Status On The Conservatorship
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Placement And Status On The Conservatorship
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Continued To Jun-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deputy City Attorney Sherri Sokeland Kaiser for the City and County of San Francisco.

The Court stated that it wanted the City Attorney to come in on the 3200 petition because it had been 90 days, that their report stated that the San Francisco Public Guardian (SFPG) had been contacted, and that to date no petition for conservatorship had been filed. Ms. Kaiser stated that the SFPG will file for conservatorship, that the Conservatee is at SF General, that there have been difficulties in trying to release him to a board and care with wanderguard, and that he is currently in a secure setting for his safety which is what he needs. The Court extended the medical powers under 3200 pending the filing of a petition for conservatorship by the SFPG and stated that if a further continuance was needed that the City Attorney could submit a request/order to continue the matter prior to the next hearing. The Court continued the matter to June 28, 2012 for status of the conservatorship.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez. Not Reported.
